title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入毛里求斯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入模里西斯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Mauritius MSB (Mauritius Standards Bureau) conformity requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards referenced in project specifications, CEB (Central Electricity Board) grid-connection requirements, URA (Utility Regulatory Authority) licensing framework, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation expectations, UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport requirements, and 50 Hz coastal grid context — versus China GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与毛里求斯MSB（毛里求斯标准局）合格评定要求、项目规格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、CEB（中央电力局）并网要求、URA（公用事业监管局）许可框架、NFPA 855消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输要求及50 Hz沿海电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與模里西斯MSB（模里西斯標準局）合格評定要求、項目規格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、CEB（中央電力局）併網要求、URA（公用事業監管局）許可框架、NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸要求及50 Hz沿海電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, MSB conformity scope determination, URA licence approval, CEB grid-connection approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Mauritius MSB technical standards, URA licensing requirements, CEB grid-connection technical specifications, fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、MSB合格评定范围裁定、URA许可批准、CEB并网批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行毛里求斯MSB技术标准、URA许可要求、CEB并网技术规格、消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、MSB合格評定範圍裁定、URA許可批准、CEB併網批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行模里西斯MSB技術標準、URA許可要求、CEB併網技術規格、消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Mauritius does not yet have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation directly equivalent to Saudi SABER/IEC 62619 or the EU Battery Regulation. BESS projects in Mauritius operate primarily under IEC-aligned international standards referenced in CEB grid-scale storage tenders and connection agreements, with overarching regulatory oversight by URA and MSB. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Mauritius are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline for project acceptance — MSB aligns with IEC and British Standards (BS) legacy, not Chinese GB; (2) IEC 62933 system-level technical requirements where referenced in CEB tender specifications; (3) fire-safety installation documentation aligned with NFPA 855 — a dominant BESS fire-installation code in IEC-aligned jurisdictions; (4) UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport documentation mandatory for lithium battery imports; (5) 50 Hz grid configuration for BESS power conversion systems (Mauritius and China both operate at 50 Hz, but voltage is 230/400 V in Mauritius versus 220/380 V in China — minimal but confirmable gap); and (6) coastal derating for cyclone exposure and salt-mist environment as required by CEB site acceptance criteria. Chinese GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC evidence in project or authority review.
answer_first.zh: 毛里求斯尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与沙特SABER/IEC 62619路径或欧盟《电池法规》直接相当。毛里求斯BESS项目主要依据CEB电网规模储能招标和并网协议中引用的IEC对齐国际标准运作，并由URA和MSB进行总体监管。中国BESS出口毛里求斯的实际差距包括：（1）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为项目验收的国际预期基准——MSB与IEC和英国标准（BS）传统对齐，而非中国GB体系；（2）CEB招标规格中引用的IEC 62933系统级技术要求；（3）符合NFPA 855的消防安全安装文件——该规范在IEC对齐司法管辖区是主流BESS消防安装规范；（4）锂电池进口强制要求的UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输文件；（5）BESS储能变流器的50 Hz电网配置（毛里求斯和中国均为50 Hz，但电压分别为230/400 V和220/380 V——差异较小但需确认）；（6）CEB现场验收标准要求的沿海抗台风和盐雾环境降额。中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558是生产基准，但在项目或主管机关审查中不被接受为IEC证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 模里西斯尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與沙特SABER/IEC 62619路徑或歐盟《電池法規》直接相當。模里西斯BESS項目主要依據CEB電網規模儲能招標和併網協議中引用的IEC對齊國際標準運作，並由URA和MSB進行總體監管。中國BESS出口模里西斯的實際差距包括：（1）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為項目驗收的國際預期基準——MSB與IEC和英國標準（BS）傳統對齊，而非中國GB體系；（2）CEB招標規格中引用的IEC 62933系統級技術要求；（3）符合NFPA 855的消防安全安裝文件——該規範在IEC對齊司法管轄區是主流BESS消防安裝規範；（4）鋰電池進口強制要求的UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸文件；（5）BESS儲能變流器的50 Hz電網配置（模里西斯和中國均為50 Hz，但電壓分別為230/400 V和220/380 V——差異較小但需確認）；（6）CEB現場驗收標準要求的沿海抗颱風和鹽霧環境降額。中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558是製造基準，但在項目或主管機關審查中不被接受為IEC證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
